rose_audit: Rose audit: blocker wording is route-specific and cannot be read as q1 sigma support closure.
fisher_review: Fisher review: SR1000 profile coverage is below the nominal 0.95 target and shows upper-tail imbalance, so the route cannot be promoted.
gauss_review: Gauss review: finite profiles do not rescue the route because boundary concentration and the negative tmbprofile fallback remain numerical blockers.
noether_review: Noether review: the decision applies only to direct sd:sigma animal(1 | id) intercept evidence, not q1 mu, matched mu+sigma, q2, q4, q8, or derived correlations.
grace_review: Grace review: the evidence remains host-labelled as Nibi SR150 plus local SR1000 replay and cannot be pooled into a new denominator claim.
curie_review: Curie review: no further top-up is useful until a new interval route asks a different simulation question.
